title: 18 McCarthy Tétrault Lawyers Recognized in Lexpert Special Edition: Insolvency and Restructuring 2025
content:
## 18 McCarthy Tétrault Lawyers Recognized in Lexpert Special Edition: Insolvency and Restructuring 2025
Lexpert has named 18 of our lawyers in its 2025 Special Edition: Insolvency and Restructuring , recognizing their meaningful contributions to the field.
As one of Canada’s largest and most experienced Bankruptcy & Restructuring teams, McCarthy Tétrault lawyers are trusted by clients across industries to deliver timely, strategic solutions that help them navigate complex insolvency matters with confidence. Our continued recognition in this category reflects the depth of experience and unwavering commitment our lawyers bring to every mandate, and highlights our focus on delivering results that matter across industries, jurisdictions, and mandates.
The following lawyers are recognized in the publication for their expertise in Insolvency and Restructuring, spanning Corporate Tax, Banking and Financial Institutions, Corporate Commercial Law, and Corporate Commercial Litigation:
- Sean F. Collins, K.C.
This Special Edition also features insights from Hugo Babos-Marchand , Partner in our Bankruptcy & Restructuring Group and Practice Lead for Litigation and Dispute Resolution in Quebec, on the evolving nature of corporate insolvencies in Canada . He discusses the rise in large-scale filings and shifting creditor expectations, noting how pandemic-era patience has given way to more assertive restructuring demands. Lexpert also spoke with Lance Williams , Partner in our Bankruptcy & Restructuring Group, on notable case law developments and the evolving use of reverse vesting orders in Canadian insolvency proceedings. He offers timely insights into how courts are shaping flexible legal frameworks and what that means for cross-border restructurings.
Access the full Special Edition: Insolvency and Restructuring 2025 publication on Lexpert ’s website.

### Our Bankruptcy & Restructuring Group
McCarthy Tétrault’s national Bankruptcy & Restructuring group benefits from the combined interdisciplinary expertise of practitioners experienced in every aspect of the insolvency process. From the strategic use of provisions in the Companies’ Creditors Arrangement Act and the Bankruptcy and Insolvency Act to guiding debtors, creditors, trustees, receivers and court appointed monitors on sensitive cross-border issues, our award-winning and rating-agency-recognized professionals are intimately acquainted with an organization’s most nuanced needs. We provide clear and timely insights to stay ahead of arising problems. Each of our lawyers brings more than 20 years of experience, making them veterans among bankruptcy and restructuring professionals across Canada and North America. Visit our website to learn more about our Bankruptcy & Restructuring Group.

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has a substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact: media@mccarthy.ca .
